title: Appendix Photon Mass: Quantized Masses of Gauge Bosons within YUCT – The Photon, Gluon, and Graviton on the Universal Mass Ladder
description: The Yakushev Unified Coordination Theory (YUCT) quantizes all masses according to the half‑integer law m = m_e · q^{N_f} with q = (3/2)^{1/3}. Gauge bosons – the photon, gluons, and the graviton – are normally considered massless, yet the universal ladder forbids a continuous zero. We show that each gauge boson is assigned a specific, finite negative index N_f consistent with all experimental bounds, leading to concrete predictions for their rest masses. The photon mass is predicted at m_γ ≈ 7×10^{-19} eV (N_f = -410), the gluon mass at m_g ≲ 10^{-9} eV (N_f ≈ -370), and the graviton mass at m_grav ≲ 10^{-22} eV (N_f ≈ -430). All values are falsifiable: future experiments that detect a non‑zero gauge boson mass must observe one of the discrete YUCT nodes, or the theory is refuted. The appendix includes a detailed consistency check with Proca electrodynamics, a Yukawa potential analysis, and a comparison with laboratory limits (Luo et al., torsion balance, solar wind MHD, Schumann resonances, geomagnetic bounds), demonstrating that the predicted photon mass lies slightly below current experimental sensitivity while remaining strictly falsifiable. This document also serves as the quantitative foundation for the speculative Photon Hypothesis (see the companion preprint), which proposes the photon as a physical interface between the 19-dimensional coordination manifold Ψ_MN and 3-dimensional reality.

custom.ru_title: Приложение Photon Mass: Квантованные массы калибровочных бозонов в YUCT – фотон, глюон и гравитон на универсальной массовой лестнице
custom.ru_description: YUCT квантует все массы по полуцелому закону m = m_e · q^{N_f}, q = (3/2)^{1/3}. Фотон, глюоны и гравитон обычно считаются безмассовыми, однако универсальная лестница не допускает непрерывного нуля. Показано, что каждый калибровочный бозон имеет конкретный отрицательный индекс N_f, согласованный со всеми экспериментальными ограничениями. Масса фотона: ≈7×10^{-19} эВ (N_f = -410); глюона: ≲ 10^{-9} эВ (N_f ≈ -370); гравитона: ≲ 10^{-22} эВ (N_f ≈ -430). Приложение включает проверку на согласие с уравнениями Прока, анализ потенциала Юкавы и сравнение с лабораторными пределами.

structural_topology.description: This directory contains the multilingual versions (EN, RU, DE, ZH, AR, JA, KO) of the appendix 'Quantized Masses of Gauge Bosons within YUCT'. The English version is the original reference; the other languages are full translations of the same technical content. This document provides the rigorous quantitative basis for the speculative Photon Hypothesis, which extends the mass quantization to propose the photon as an active interface between the coordination manifold and physical reality.

fundamental_concepts.experimental_consistency: Predicted masses lie at or slightly below the most stringent laboratory limits (torsion balance, solar wind MHD, Schumann resonances)

derived_predictions.Proca_Yukawa_check: Compton wavelength λ_c ≈ 2.70×10^{11} m; deviations from Coulomb's law below 10^{-12}
derived_predictions.vacuum_dispersion: Time delay for extragalactic radio signals ~10^{-15} s, far below pulsar timing precision
derived_predictions.falsifiability: Any future detection of a non‑zero gauge boson mass must fall on a discrete half‑integer node of the YUCT ladder; otherwise the theory is refuted
derived_predictions.photon_hypothesis_link: The predicted photon mass m_γ ≈ 7.3×10^{-19} eV serves as the quantitative anchor for the speculative Photon Hypothesis, which proposes that this finite rest mass is the 'toll' the photon pays to function as an interface between the 19-dimensional coordination manifold Ψ_MN and 3-dimensional physical reality

custom.notes: This is the complete multilingual documentation of the Appendix Photon Mass, version 1.0. Each language file (EN, RU, DE, ZH, AR, JA, KO) is a full translation of the entire text, including all equations, tables, and references. The Zenodo community for YUCT is 'yuct'. The universal exponent β = 2/3 (0.6667) is explicitly included in the keywords for discoverability. This appendix provides the rigorous, falsifiable mass predictions that underpin the more speculative Photon Hypothesis; the two documents should be read together for a complete picture.
